title: Reporting on Green Procurement - Canada.ca
content:
## Reporting on Green Procurement
Immigration, Refugee and Citizenship Canada is bound by the Federal Sustainable Development Act and was required to develop a 2020 to 2023 Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy (DSDS). Immigration, Refugee and Citizenship Canada has developed its corresponding 2021–22 DSDS Report , including applicable reporting on green procurement activities. This report can be found on Immigration, Refugee and Citizenship Canada’s website.
